section_title: Filling or registration of documents, etc, after the time specified: - Any documents or return by this Act required
content:
350. Filling or registration of documents, etc, after the time specified: - Any documents or return by this Act required
or authorized to be file or registered or any fact by this Act required or authorized to be registered with the Register on
payment of fees specified therefore in Schedule II any without prejudice to any other labilities be filed or registered after the
time if any pacifier in this Act for its filing or registration on payment of late fee specified in the said Schedule II.
PART VII
APPLICATION OF ACT TO COMPANIES FORMED AND REGISTERED
UNDER FORMER COMPANIES ACT
